src: A modern platform tailored for hosting providers and enthusiasts to effortlessly interact with their servers. Seamlessly wrapping around Proxmox, Convoy is easily deployable, affordable at just $6 per node per month for commercial use, and completely free for personal and non-profit endeavors.
ja: ホスティングプロバイダーや愛好家がサーバーを手軽に操作できる、Proxmox をラップしたモダンなプラットフォーム。商用利用は月額 $6/ノードと低コストで、個人・非営利利用は完全無料。デプロイも容易
